svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.1.2 Chrome/138.0.7204.243 Electron/37.4.0 Safari/537.36" version="28.1.2" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="p7ODhYMk_4aX838MRzpI" name="结点结构"> <mxGraphModel dx="496" dy="344" grid="1" gridSize="4" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="1" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="Q60WZ2CCcFyb5Cygjnd6-1" value="" style="shape=table;startSize=0;container=1;collapsible=0;childLayout=tableLayout;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="432" y="316" width="120" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q60WZ2CCcFyb5Cygjnd6-2" value="" style="shape=tableRow;horizontal=0;startSize=0;swimlaneHead=0;swimlaneBody=0;strokeColor=inherit;top=0;left=0;bottom=0;right=0;collapsible=0;dropTarget=0;fillColor=none;points=[[0,0.5],[1,0.5]];portConstraint=eastwest;" vertex="1" parent="Q60WZ2CCcFyb5Cygjnd6-1"> <mxGeometry width="120" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q60WZ2CCcFyb5Cygjnd6-3" value="$$DATA$$" style="shape=partialRectangle;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;connectable=0;strokeColor=inherit;overflow=hidden;fillColor=none;top=0;left=0;bottom=0;right=0;pointerEvents=1;" vertex="1" parent="Q60WZ2CCcFyb5Cygjnd6-2"> <mxGeometry width="60" height="40" as="geometry"> <mxRectangle width="60" height="40" as="alternateBounds" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q60WZ2CCcFyb5Cygjnd6-4" value="$$NEXT$$" style="shape=partialRectangle;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;connectable=0;strokeColor=inherit;overflow=hidden;fillColor=none;top=0;left=0;bottom=0;right=0;pointerEvents=1;" vertex="1" parent="Q60WZ2CCcFyb5Cygjnd6-2"> <mxGeometry x="60" width="60" height="40" as="geometry"> <mxRectangle width="60" height="40" as="alternateBounds" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
